channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed

item.title: "They have absolutely transformed what was once the most str…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: "They have absolutely transformed what was once the most stressful part of my routine." Packing your skin- and hair-care routine for traveling can be annoying and a mess. These containers made our Wirecutter tester's life so much easier. nyti.ms/4fzYyBp
item.content:encoded: "They have absolutely transformed what was once the most stressful part of my routine." Packing your skin- and hair-care routine for traveling can be annoying and a mess. These containers made our Wirecutter tester's life so much easier. nyti.ms/4fzYyBp

item.title: Prediction market users are poised to make the World Cup the…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Prediction market users are poised to make the World Cup the largest gambling event in history, analysts said. When Argentina and Spain take the field on Sunday for the final game, more than $5.55 billion will be riding on the winner on Polymarket and Kalshi. trib.al/ycfgRtu
item.content:encoded: Prediction market users are poised to make the World Cup the largest gambling event in history, analysts said. When Argentina and Spain take the field on Sunday for the final game, more than $5.55 billion will be riding on the winner on Polymarket and Kalshi. trib.al/ycfgRtu

item.author: The Guardian (@theguardian.com)
item.description: France v England: World Cup third-place playoff – live
item.content:encoded: France v England: World Cup third-place playoff – live

item.title: Replacing a Senate candidate is rare, and procedures vary by…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Replacing a Senate candidate is rare, and procedures vary by state. Here is how the Maine Democratic Party plans to replace Graham Platner, the Senate nominee who withdrew after a rape allegation he denies.
item.content:encoded: Replacing a Senate candidate is rare, and procedures vary by state. Here is how the Maine Democratic Party plans to replace Graham Platner, the Senate nominee who withdrew after a rape allegation he denies.

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー 役割ごとにFableとGPT-5.6を使い分けるAgent Teamの設計 はじめに こんにちは。…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
役割ごとにFableとGPT-5.6を使い分けるAgent Teamの設計

はじめに こんにちは。 ここ2週間ほどで、コーディングに使えるモデルが一気に増えました。 Anthropic からは Fable 5 が出て、GPT-5.6 は Sol、Terra、Luna の3段構えで登場し、しかもティアごとに reasoning effort の設定まで付いています。 どれを使えばいいのか、Fable と Sol はどちらが強いのか、という比較記事...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
役割ごとにFableとGPT-5.6を使い分けるAgent Teamの設計

はじめに こんにちは。 ここ2週間ほどで、コーディングに使えるモデルが一気に増えました。 Anthropic からは Fable 5 が出て、GPT-5.6 は Sol、Terra、Luna の3段構えで登場し、しかもティアごとに reasoning effort の設定まで付いています。 どれを使えばいいのか、Fable と Sol はどちらが強いのか、という比較記事...

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 ドローン戦に迅速に適応するロシア軍、4年前とは別物 「兵站封鎖」にも精鋭部隊が対応中 | Forbes…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖政治と経済
ドローン戦に迅速に適応するロシア軍、4年前とは別物　「兵站封鎖」にも精鋭部隊が対応中 | Forbes JAPAN 公式サイト（フォーブス ジャパン）

現在のロシア軍は、2022年2月にウクライナに全面侵攻した当時の軍隊と同じではない。 ウクライナは戦場の様相を繰り返し変えてきた。しかし4年以上にわたる戦争を通じて、ロシアは、変化を認識し、戦訓を汲み取り、それを制度化する能力を備えた軍隊を築きあげた。今日のロシア軍は、2022年当時よりもはるかに速いペース...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖政治と経済
ドローン戦に迅速に適応するロシア軍、4年前とは別物　「兵站封鎖」にも精鋭部隊が対応中 | Forbes JAPAN 公式サイト（フォーブス ジャパン）

現在のロシア軍は、2022年2月にウクライナに全面侵攻した当時の軍隊と同じではない。 ウクライナは戦場の様相を繰り返し変えてきた。しかし4年以上にわたる戦争を通じて、ロシアは、変化を認識し、戦訓を汲み取り、それを制度化する能力を備えた軍隊を築きあげた。今日のロシア軍は、2022年当時よりもはるかに速いペース...

item.title: You may have read “The Odyssey” in high school. Refresh your…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: You may have read “The Odyssey” in high school. Refresh your memory of Homer’s epic poem, which has monster battles, a sorceress and dozens of thirsty suitors, before you see Christopher Nolan’s film adaptation.
item.content:encoded: You may have read “The Odyssey” in high school. Refresh your memory of Homer’s epic poem, which has monster battles, a sorceress and dozens of thirsty suitors, before you see Christopher Nolan’s film adaptation.

item.title: The Northeast on Saturday was being hit by thunderstorms tha…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The Northeast on Saturday was being hit by thunderstorms that were flushing out the acrid air from wildfire smoke. But forecasters warned of winds over 70 miles per hour in New York City and Philadelphia.
item.content:encoded: The Northeast on Saturday was being hit by thunderstorms that were flushing out the acrid air from wildfire smoke. But forecasters warned of winds over 70 miles per hour in New York City and Philadelphia.

item.title: After nearly half of House Democrats voted to eliminate aid …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: After nearly half of House Democrats voted to eliminate aid to Israel this week, the pro-Israel lobbying group AIPAC closed off online donations for more than a dozen lawmakers that it had endorsed. nyti.ms/4vHvLjk
item.content:encoded: After nearly half of House Democrats voted to eliminate aid to Israel this week, the pro-Israel lobbying group AIPAC closed off online donations for more than a dozen lawmakers that it had endorsed. nyti.ms/4vHvLjk

item.title: Produce supplier Taylor Farms is recalling iceberg lettuce s…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Produce supplier Taylor Farms is recalling iceberg lettuce shipped to 27 US states because of potential contamination with cyclospora, the parasite causing thousands of cases of diarrhea across the country. https://cnn.it/4pwWPAj
item.content:encoded: Produce supplier Taylor Farms is recalling iceberg lettuce shipped to 27 US states because of potential contamination with cyclospora, the parasite causing thousands of cases of diarrhea across the country. https://cnn.it/4pwWPAj

item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)

item.content:encoded: BREAKING: Two U.S. service members were killed while defending against an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack in Jordan, and another service member is missing, U.S. Central Command said.

item.title: For generations, the formula for getting ahead in America se…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: For generations, the formula for getting ahead in America seemed straightforward. Today, that formula increasingly depends on something many Americans can't control: whether their family has the financial means to help along the way. https://cnn.it/3T92XTc
item.content:encoded: For generations, the formula for getting ahead in America seemed straightforward. Today, that formula increasingly depends on something many Americans can't control: whether their family has the financial means to help along the way. https://cnn.it/3T92XTc

item.title: The channel or streaming service that you choose to watch li…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The channel or streaming service that you choose to watch live sporting events on could determine whether you see a big moment a bit earlier than others — or worse, a bit later.
item.content:encoded: The channel or streaming service that you choose to watch live sporting events on could determine whether you see a big moment a bit earlier than others — or worse, a bit later.

item.title: Breaking News: Two U.S. service members were killed and a th…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Breaking News: Two U.S. service members were killed and a third was missing after an Iranian attack on a base in Jordan, according to the Pentagon. Follow live updates.
item.content:encoded: Breaking News: Two U.S. service members were killed and a third was missing after an Iranian attack on a base in Jordan, according to the Pentagon. Follow live updates.

item.title: #🔖世の中 インドに「約束を守らない」「すぐにひっくり返す」と牧原秀樹元法相が投稿、高速鉄道の開業遅れ「１００％インド…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
インドに「約束を守らない」「すぐにひっくり返す」と牧原秀樹元法相が投稿、高速鉄道の開業遅れ「１００％インド側のせい」

【読売新聞】　【バンコク＝井戸田崇志】日本の新幹線方式を採用するインド西部の高速鉄道の開業が当初目標の２０２３年から大幅に遅れていることについて、牧原秀樹元法相がＸ（旧ツイッター）に「１００％インド側のせいだ」と投稿し、インド政府が
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
インドに「約束を守らない」「すぐにひっくり返す」と牧原秀樹元法相が投稿、高速鉄道の開業遅れ「１００％インド側のせい」

【読売新聞】　【バンコク＝井戸田崇志】日本の新幹線方式を採用するインド西部の高速鉄道の開業が当初目標の２０２３年から大幅に遅れていることについて、牧原秀樹元法相がＸ（旧ツイッター）に「１００％インド側のせいだ」と投稿し、インド政府が

item.title: Two US service members were killed and another is missing fo…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: Two US service members were killed and another is missing following Iranian strikes in Jordan, the US military says, marking the first deaths of American troops in the Iran war since March. https://cnn.it/4gGA0Yz
item.content:encoded: Two US service members were killed and another is missing following Iranian strikes in Jordan, the US military says, marking the first deaths of American troops in the Iran war since March. https://cnn.it/4gGA0Yz

item.title: “The situation has become unbearable.” U.S. airstrikes targe…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: “The situation has become unbearable.” U.S. airstrikes targeting southern Iran have rattled Iranians’ nerves this week, they said in interviews, and destroyed key links between one province and the rest of the country.
item.content:encoded: “The situation has become unbearable.” U.S. airstrikes targeting southern Iran have rattled Iranians’ nerves this week, they said in interviews, and destroyed key links between one province and the rest of the country.

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム [100話]クソ女に幸あれ - 岸川瑞樹 | 少年ジャンプ＋ クソ女に幸あれ 岸川瑞樹 <100…

item.content:encoded:

item.title: The wildfire smoke swirling to the east from Minnesota and O…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: The wildfire smoke swirling to the east from Minnesota and Ontario isn’t going away, but where it affects air quality will shift over the next few days. Conditions were improving Saturday for parts of the Northeast, a forecaster said.
item.content:encoded: The wildfire smoke swirling to the east from Minnesota and Ontario isn’t going away, but where it affects air quality will shift over the next few days. Conditions were improving Saturday for parts of the Northeast, a forecaster said.

item.title: イオン県央店（燕市）駐車場出入り口付近、3歳女児が車にはねられ意識不明の重体 容疑で男を現行犯逮捕
item.author: 47NEWS (@47news.jp)
item.description: イオン県央店（燕市）駐車場出入り口付近、3歳女児が車にはねられ意識不明の重体 容疑で男を現行犯逮捕
item.content:encoded: イオン県央店（燕市）駐車場出入り口付近、3歳女児が車にはねられ意識不明の重体 容疑で男を現行犯逮捕
